item.title: Blog
item.description: vscode c++运行程序system()调用无现象：externalConsole项false改成true即可 创作人： D36C366C9DE10C66C729DF518FC36465 EAFFA9B6C43B77DBFA457E158DD3663E 74329B0955D26487FF82D302BDE7669B F837ED597D66A261D9A210ED4FC07A3B
